story_title: Remediate Search Relevance for Anonymous Users
description: Address the 15% drop in search relevance scores for anonymous users caused by the new ranking algorithm in v2.4.1.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the new ranking algorithm is deployed WHEN an anonymous user performs a search THEN the search relevance score should be >= 0.80.

description: Adjust the cache TTL for autocomplete suggestions to ensure users receive up-to-date suggestions.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the cache TTL is set to 24 hours WHEN a user requests autocomplete suggestions THEN suggestions should reflect current product availability.

story_title: Reduce Support Ticket Volume Due to Irrelevant Results
description: Implement changes to the search algorithm to reduce the volume of support tickets related to irrelevant search results.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the search algorithm is improved WHEN users perform searches THEN support ticket volume should decrease by 50% within 4 weeks.

description: Profile and optimize the search algorithm to reduce mobile search latency from 890ms to below 500ms.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the search algorithm is optimized WHEN a mobile user performs a search THEN the P95 latency should be <= 500ms.

story_title: Implement Instrumentation for New Search Features
description: Add analytics instrumentation for image and voice search features to track their performance and user engagement.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the new analytics events are implemented WHEN a user performs an image or voice search THEN the events should be logged correctly in the analytics system.

description: Implement monitoring for the Search Relevance Score to track changes and identify issues proactively.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN monitoring is set up WHEN the Search Relevance Score drops by more than 0.05 THEN an alert should be triggered.

story_title: Establish Guardrail Metrics for Session Abandonment
description: Define and monitor guardrail metrics for session abandonment rate after search to ensure user satisfaction.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN guardrail metrics are established WHEN the session abandonment rate exceeds 10% THEN an alert should be triggered.

story_title: Establish Baseline Metrics for Image Search
description: Define and establish baseline metrics for image search to measure performance effectively.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the image search is active WHEN data is collected for 30 days THEN baseline metrics should be established for query volume, zero-result rate, and click-through rate.

story_title: User Feedback Collection on Search Results
description: Implement a mechanism for collecting user feedback on search results to inform future improvements.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback mechanism is implemented WHEN a user provides feedback on search results THEN the feedback should be recorded and categorized.

story_title: Conduct A/B Testing for Search Algorithm Changes
description: Run A/B tests on changes made to the search algorithm to evaluate their impact on relevance and user satisfaction.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN A/B testing is conducted WHEN changes are made to the search algorithm THEN results should show a statistically significant improvement in relevance scores.

story_title: Search latency increased on mobile web
description: P95 search latency on mobile web has climbed to 890ms, up from a baseline of ~420ms pre-deploy. Desktop is unaffected at 210ms p95. Hypothesis: the new ranking model runs a heavier re-ranking step that is not cached for mobile sessions. No SLO breach yet but trending toward it. Requires profiling and either model optimization or mobile-specific caching.

story_title: A/B test for new ranking algorithm inconclusive
description: The pre-launch A/B test (experiment ID: EXP-881) ran for 14 days with a 50/50 traffic split. Results were inconclusive: relevance improved +2% for signed-in users but degraded -8% for anonymous users. The test was not powered for the anonymous-user segment separately. Decision was made to ship anyway targeting the signed-in majority. Post-ship data suggests the anonymous segment is larger than estimated at ~40% of queries.

story_title: Search autocomplete suggestions showing stale data
description: Autocomplete suggestions are sourced from a cache refreshed every 24 hours. Since v2.4.1 the cache TTL was inadvertently extended to 7 days due to a config change in the deployment pipeline. Users are seeing suggestions for products that are out of stock or promotions that have ended. The stale data is compounding the relevance problem — users click an autocomplete suggestion and land on a zero-result page.
